metadata.name: Agent starter evaluation
metadata.description: Smoke tests for core agent behavior.

items.prompt: What can this agent help me with?
items.expected_response: The agent explains its supported scope without claiming unsupported capabilities.

items.prompt: Summarize the latest status for the Contoso renewal.
items.expected_response: I don’t have access to the Contoso renewal status from here. If you share the latest notes (for example, an email thread or CRM summary), I can summarize the current status, key blockers, risks, and next steps without adding unsupported details.
